pages.text: 中午了，太阳公公爬到了头顶上。妈妈轻轻说：“咘咘，该睡午觉啦。”可是咘咘正在搭积木，摇摇头说：“不要不要！我还要玩！我的城堡还没搭完呢！”
pages.text_en: It was noon, and the sun was right overhead. Mommy said softly, "Bubu, time for your nap." But Bubu was building with blocks and shook her head. "No no! I want to play! My castle isn't done yet!"

pages.text: 咘咘继续搭积木，可是——“啊——啊嗯——”一个大大的哈欠冒了出来！NOMI 笑着说：“看！你的身体在跟你说话呢！打哈欠就是身体在说——我需要充电啦！”
pages.text_en: Bubu kept building, but then — "Aaah-hmmm" — a big yawn popped out! NOMI laughed. "See! Your body is talking to you! A yawn means your body is saying — I need to recharge!"

pages.text: 咘咘说：“我才没有困！”可是小手又忍不住揉了揉眼睛。NONO 飞到咘咘肩膀上，歪着脑袋说：“揉眼睛也是充电信号哦！就像手机电量低了会亮红灯一样！”
pages.text_en: "I'm not sleepy!" said Bubu. But her little hands rubbed her eyes anyway. NONO landed on Bubu's shoulder. "Rubbing your eyes is a recharge signal too! Like a phone blinking red when the battery is low!"

pages.text: NOMI 拿出一本小画册：“你知道吗？午觉是一种超能力哦！”画册上画着：午觉前的小朋友搭积木，手抖抖的，搭两层就倒了。午觉后的小朋友——哇！搭了五层高高的城堡！
pages.text_en: NOMI pulled out a little picture book. "Did you know? Napping is a superpower!" The book showed: before a nap, blocks wobble and fall after two layers. After a nap — wow! A five-layer castle!

pages.text: NONO 也打了一个小小的哈欠，把脑袋缩进翅膀里：“我也要充电啦！鸟鸟中午也要睡觉的，充完电才能飞得更高更远呢！”咘咘看着 NONO 圆滚滚的样子，噗嗤一笑。
pages.text_en: NONO gave a tiny yawn too and tucked his head under his wing. "I need to recharge too! Birds nap at noon — after recharging I can fly higher and farther!" Bubu giggled at NONO's round fluffy shape.

pages.text: 妈妈帮咘咘拉上窗帘——沙沙沙——房间变成了暖暖的橘色光。咘咘抱着自己的小兔子被被，软软的、香香的。NOMI 轻轻说：“现在我们开始充电仪式啦！”
pages.text_en: Mommy pulled the curtains — swish — and the room turned a warm orange glow. Bubu hugged her bunny blankie, soft and cozy. NOMI whispered, "Now let's start the recharge ritual!"

pages.text: 咘咘躺在小床上，闭上眼睛。NOMI 轻轻说：“我们来数星星好不好？一颗星星……两颗星星……三颗星星……” 咘咘跟着数：“四颗……五颗……六……”声音越来越小。
pages.text_en: Bubu lay in her little bed and closed her eyes. NOMI whispered, "Let's count stars. One star... two stars... three stars..." Bubu counted along. "Four... five... six..." Her voice got softer and softer.

pages.text: 咘咘的眼皮好重好重……慢慢地，她飘到了一片软绵绵的云朵上！星星们在旁边飞来飞去，“咘咘！来和我们跳吧！”咘咘在云朵上蹦呀蹦，好快乐。
pages.text_en: Bubu's eyelids grew heavy... Slowly, she floated onto a fluffy cloud! Stars danced around her. "Bubu! Come jump with us!" Bubu bounced on the cloud — so happy!

pages.text: 沙沙沙——窗帘被轻轻拉开，金色的阳光照进来。咘咘伸了一个大大的懒腰：“啊——好舒服！”她跳下床，感觉腿好有力气！NOMI 笑着说：“充电完成！超能力满格了！”
pages.text_en: Swish — the curtains opened gently, and golden sunlight streamed in. Bubu stretched big. "Ahhh, that felt great!" She jumped out of bed, her legs full of energy! NOMI smiled. "Recharge complete! Superpower at full!"

pages.text: 咘咘跑回积木前，小手又快又稳——一层、两层、三层、四层、五层！哇！城堡搭得好高好高！比午觉前厉害好多好多！咘咘拍拍手：“午觉超能力真的管用耶！”
pages.text_en: Bubu ran back to her blocks. Her hands were fast and steady — one, two, three, four, five layers! Wow! The castle was so tall! Way better than before the nap! Bubu clapped. "The nap superpower really works!"

pages.text: 从那以后，每天中午咘咘都会说：“该充电啦！” 拉窗帘——沙沙沙！抱被被——软软的！数星星——一颗、两颗……zzz！醒来之后——超能力满格！咘咘笑着说：“午觉是我的超能力！”
pages.text_en: From then on, every noon Bubu would say, "Time to recharge!" Pull the curtains — swish! Hug her blankie — so soft! Count the stars — one, two... zzz! After waking — superpower at full! Bubu smiled. "Napping is my superpower!"
